---
title: "How I Learned Quarto"
author: Francesca Chen
date: today
format: 
  revealjs:
      footer: "A General Overview"
      logo: https://morinlab.github.io/images/team/MorinLabLogo200.jpg
      transition: fade
embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

## The Basics

-   Headings

-   Embedding code

-   Adding a footer/footnotes

-   Creating tip box

-   To collapse tip box

-   Wrapping code

-   Adding speaker notes

## Headings

Use \`##\` to create a heading

\`## Heading here\`

## Embedding code

1.  Type \`\`\``{r}`
2.  Add code

```{r}
paste("here is my code")
plot(1)
```

## Adding a footer/footnotes

1.  Add to preamble:

    \`

    footer:

    \`

## Creating tip box

1.  Create \`:::\`
2.  Space, then add {.callout-tip}
3.  Add text and/images

::: callout-tip
Put tip here!
:::

## To collapse the tip box:

1.  Follow steps 1 and 2
2.  add \`collapse="true"\` after {.callout-tip}
3.  Note that this only works for HTML

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## Now you have a markdown!

Put tip here
:::

## Wrapping code

1.  In the preamble add

    \`

    format:

    html:

    code-overflow: wrap

    \`

## Adding speaker notes

1.  Type \`:::\`
2.  Space, then type "{.notes}"
3.  Press the "s" key to see them!

::: notes
Here are your speaker notes! Can you read this?
:::

## Image

1.  For online images

-   click open this image in new tab
-   copy address
-   use this format: `![](paste link here)`

2.  For images in device's files

-   track path to and paste

![](https://morinlab.github.io/images/team/MorinLabLogo200.jpg)

## embed-resources: true

-   without this in preamble the file containing any images/plots/graphics/etc will exist (e.g. How I Learned Quarto_files) however if you send your quarto document the recipient will be unable to see them
-   with this the file will not exist and recipients will be able to see images included

## revealjs or html?

-   revealjs:
    -   presentation style
    -   has speaker notes function
-   html:
    -   document style
    -   has tip box collapse function

## Preamble additions

```{r}
paste("Note: if in preamble will be applied to all slides")
```

-   logo: (insert address/link)
-   footer: (add footnote)
-   theme: (e.g. dark)
-   transition: (e.g. fade)
